author: nnyj
description: Renders markdown pipe tables that are indented inside list items. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: nnyj
manifest.description: Renders markdown pipe tables that are indented inside list items.
manifest.name: Indented Table

name: Indented Table

releases.author: nnyj
releases.description:
Initial release.

- Detects indented pipe tables (inside list items) in live preview
- Hides separator row, bolds header, fades pipes
- No-wrap on table lines, row borders scoped to table width
- Uses CM6 mark/line decorations (widget/replace blocked by Obsidian)
